title: JSON path compiler accepts invalid input
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE json_test (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, data JSON NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT id, JSON_UNQUOTE(data->'$.name') AS name FROM json_test WHERE JSON_UNQUOTE(data->'$.value') + 0 > 100;
UPDATE json_test SET data = JSON_SET(data, '$.new_key', 'new_value') WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: JSON path compiler accepts invalid JSON input
